lines.lyrics: Life is much better when I am with you
I was floating like a lost soul losing control again
The never-ending search for something better fell through
I'll do everything demanded if you mend my soul till the end
You're my living water
A place that swallows my ugly past
Stopped me at the border
Now my mind can rest
Just a sweet daughter of a coal miner trying to save the world
Even in an age where the internet glows red with overloaded garbage
She can see the big picture and it makes her feel good
She'll do anything she can to make others feel better
You're my living water
A place that swallows my ugly past
Stopped me at the border
Now my mind can rest
You can have the world, there's nothing in the way
But I can't keep you furled when you could fly away
You'll always be the part of me that does the right thing
Even with a devil on my shoulder in a mid 20's fantasy
With our hands together will turn another page
Ride into the sun and we'll never look back again
You're my living water
A place that swallows my ugly past
Stopped me at the border
Now my mind can rest
